description_long: This is a modern, boxy two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design. The exterior is clad in reddish-brown brick, featuring large black-framed windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The front facade includes a small balcony with metal railings and potted plants, as well as a fenced-in yard and a gate leading to the main entrance. Attached to the side is a single-car garage with a flat roof, seamlessly integrated into the overall structure. The rear of the house also features a balcony and a patio area, both enclosed by dark wooden fencing. The overall aesthetic is clean and urban, with a focus on geometric lines and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story brick house with large black-framed windows, flat roof, balconies, and an attached garage. The design features clean lines, fenced outdoor areas, and a minimalist urban aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, fenced yard, balcony with plants, and attached garage.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the garage, symmetrical window arrangement, and upper-level balcony.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible garage, fewer windows, and a section of the fenced yard.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the balcony, patio area, and large window, with the fence enclosing the outdoor space.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door, small porch, and is accessed through a fenced gate with no overhang or decorative columns.
